CREATE TABLE "obj_68b4c3a2_266c_4a4e_b7dc_507a06ba95a5" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "repository" TEXT,
    "language" TEXT,
    "team" TEXT,
    "owner" TEXT,
    "dependencies" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "health_check_url" TEXT,
    "runbook" TEXT,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_68b4c3a2_266c_4a4e_b7dc_507a06ba95a5" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_68b4c3a2266c4a4e_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
